narrative:
Trenton 2 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,117 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
